commit_consistency.reason: Only 4 active weeks - looks like deadline-driven coding
commit_consistency.improvement: Your commit graph looks very bursty. Recuiters look for steady momentum. Try to make at least one meaningful commit every week.

fork_ratio.reason: 6 original repos out of 6 - solid original work
fork_ratio.improvement: You have a great ratio of original work. Keep focusing on building your own projects from scratch.

readme_quality.reason: READMEs exist but lack setup instructions or demos
readme_quality.improvement: Your READMEs are a bit sparse. Add installation steps, usage examples with code blocks, and visual screenshots to grab attention.

language_diversity.reason: Uses CSS, JavaScript, Python - decent range
language_diversity.improvement: You show a solid, focused tech stack. Make sure you highlight your strongest language in your pinned repositories.

project_depth.reason: Projects look shallow - small size, no stars, no descriptions
project_depth.improvement: Your projects look like fast tutorials or homework assignments. Try building one large, deeply integrated application to demonstrate architectural skills.

peer_benchmark.reason: Around average - room to stand out more
peer_benchmark.improvement: You have a baseline profile. Pick one specific area (like READMEs or project depth) to polish to jump into the elite tier.
